mnemonics.title: OSPF Packet Types Order
mnemonics.content: HELL D R S - Hello, DBD, LSR, LSU, LSAck. Remember: 'HELL DoR S' (HELL + DoR + S)

mnemonics.title: OSPF Neighbor States
mnemonics.content: DIE 2 E F - Down, Init, ExStart, Exchange, Loading, Full. Or: 'DIE 2 Elephants Faint' (Down, Init, 2-Way, ExStart, Exchange, Loading, Full)

mnemonics.title: OSPF LSA Types
mnemonics.content: Router Network Summary ASBR External - Type 1=Router, Type 2=Network, Type 3=Summary, Type 4=ASBR Summary, Type 5=External, Type 7=NSSA

acronyms.usage: Interior Gateway Protocol using link-state routing and Dijkstra's algorithm
Routing protocol used within a single autonomous system
Building block containing routing information in OSPF
Database containing all LSAs in an OSPF area
Router elected on multi-access networks to reduce adjacency overhead
Backup to DR, takes over if DR fails
Router connecting OSPF areas to the backbone
Router connecting OSPF to external autonomous systems
Stub area that can import external routes as Type 7 LSAs

visualTips.visualization: Draw a central Area 0 (backbone) with spokes radiating to other areas (Area 1, Area 2, etc.) - like a wheel with hub and spokes
Picture a round table meeting where one person (DR) collects/discusses, with a backup (BDR). All others only talk to DR/BDR, not each other directly
Think of ripples in water - when a router detects change, ripples (LSAs) spread outward to all neighbors, who then propagate further
Imagine a spider web where router is center, each link has cost as length. SPF finds shortest path by measuring total length to each point

analogies.analogy: OSPF is like GPS navigation (calculates best route based on real-time traffic/distance), while RIP is like asking locals for directions (fixed hop count limit of 15)
Think of LSDB as a detailed map of all roads in a city - every router has identical complete map, allowing each to calculate best route independently
Areas are like postal zones - within same zone (area), everyone knows all addresses; cross-zone mail goes through main sorting center (Area 0)
Cost is like toll charges - path with lower total tolls (cost) is preferred over shorter distance with higher tolls
OSPF neighbors are like neighbors who introduce themselves (Hello), exchange house inventories (DBD), request missing items (LSR), and confirm receipt (LSAck)
